articles.title: EU prepares for jet fuel sharing as supplies dwindle
articles.body: Energy commissioner Dan Jørgensen says Europe moving towards supply crisis “very rapidly”

articles.title: Banks weathered the storm of the Iran war. How did they do it and can they keep doing it?
articles.body: Bank earnings confirmed one thing this week: The Iran war may be a geopolitical upheaval, but not a financial one. At least not yet.
